situationSummary: Multi-agency authorization obtained. Environment Agency (EA) and National Grid ESO have signed. Cascade fully mapped: 6 nodes impacted across 3 sectors. Reservoir Alpha at 87% — 8 minutes to overflow threshold at current inflow rate. All safety constraints verified. Playbook ready for execution.
proposedAction: 1. Isolate Pump Station 7 from Substation A fault. 2. Open reservoir preemptive release gate to reduce flood risk. 3. Activate backup water supply route to hospital. 4. Notify National Grid ESO for Sub A restoration priority.
regulatoryBasis: Civil Contingencies Act 2004, Section 2. Flood and Water Management Act 2010, Section 14. Environment Agency operational protocol EA-OP-372. Emergency Powers Act 2004.

notes: High confidence: cascade confirmed, all constraints satisfied
Reservoir overflow timing validated against EA flood model
Minor uncertainty: Sub A auto-recovery still possible but unlikely after 12 minutes
